/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/math_tests.dir/SchoolTasks.cpp.o -o math_tests   -L/home/ubuntu/openmind/bin  -L/home/ubuntu/openmind/omnn/math  -L/home/ubuntu/openmind/omnn/storage  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ubuntu/openmind/bin:/home/ubuntu/openmind/omnn/math:/home/ubuntu/openmind/omnn/storage ../libmath.a ../../rt/librt.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_thread.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_unit_test_framework.a ../../storage/libstorage.a ../../rt/librt.a -lOpenCL /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_thread.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_serialization.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_filesystem.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libtbb.so.12.5 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libleveldb.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenCL.so -lpthread -ldl
